entities.name: Heat Zones
entities.context: Strategic classification framework for themes by state (emerging, etc.)

entities.name: Emerging
entities.context: Heat Zone state for new themes gaining momentum, characterized by low consensus, positive trajectory, low divergence

entities.name: consensus
entities.context: Metric used in Heat Zones classification, threshold < 0.5 for Emerging state

entities.name: trajectory
entities.context: Metric measuring directional momentum, threshold > +0.1 for Emerging state

entities.name: divergence
entities.context: Metric measuring spread/disagreement, threshold < 0.3 for Emerging state

relationships.context: Emerging is one classification state within the Heat Zones framework
Low consensus (< 0.5) is a defining criterion for Emerging themes
Positive trajectory (> +0.1) is a defining criterion for Emerging themes
Low divergence (< 0.3) is a defining criterion for Emerging themes
